title: astragalus caprinus
intro: Astragalus caprinus, also known as the goat's thorn or caprine goat's thorn, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the legume family. The plant's roots and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Astragalus caprinus is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional folk medicine.
